title: Seeded Asteroid Generation, Polygons, Sizes, and Difficulty Inputs · Runtime Lens: Polygon Generation
summary: Random points self-intersect, seeds are global and hidden, small rocks award less but move impossibly, spawns overlap the ship, and difficulty grows without bound. Predict player-visible behavior, state, units, timing, input, rendering, feedback, failure, accessibility, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the polygon generation increment in seeded readable asteroid factory. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practic…
objectives: Generate ordered angular vertices with bounded radius variation and validate minimum size, winding, and intersections.
Inject a dedicated random generator and record seed and draw order without claiming cryptographic randomness.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: asteroids-worked-asteroids-generation-polygons-difficulty-2
# Competency: asteroids-worked-asteroids-generation-polygons-difficulty-2.
# Case 7417: a headless continuous-integration replay.
# Operating constraint: record the first failed invariant, repair, regression evidence, playtest observation, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: replay the same input trace at 30, 60, and 144 presentation frames per second and compare simulation state.
def worked_asteroids_generation_polygons_difficulty_2(vertices: int = 11, min_radius: float = 18.0, max_radius: float = 31.0, seeded_equal: bool = True, self_intersections: int = 0, spawn_budget: int = 7) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "playerworked2",
        "seed7417",
        "input2dekrow",
        "frameworked27417",
        "state7417worked2",
        "playtest2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if vertices < 5 or min_radius <= 0.0 or max_radius < min_radius:
        return False, vertices, "polygon-domain"
    if not seeded_equal:
        return False, vertices, "rng-drift"
    if self_intersections > 0:
        return False, self_intersections, "invalid-polygon"
    if spawn_budget < 1:
        return False, spawn_budget, "spawn-budget"
    assert max_radius >= min_radius
    return True, spawn_budget, "seeded-asteroids"

content.code:
# Evidence: asteroids-polygon-generation-11b2ku
# Competency: asteroids-polygon-generation.
# Case 1595: a low-vision laptop playtest at 125 percent scaling.
# Operating constraint: test empty, zero-vector, seam, low-frame-rate, focus-loss, device-loss, missing-asset, corrupted-save, and rejected cases.
# Changed case: inject a 400 millisecond frame stall and prove the update budget prevents a spiral of death.
def evidence_asteroids_polygon_generation_11b2ku(vertices: int = 11, min_radius: float = 18.0, max_radius: float = 31.0, seeded_equal: bool = True, self_intersections: int = 0, spawn_budget: int = 7) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_11b2ku = "11b2ku-uk2b11-1595"
    assert evidence_variant_11b2ku
    evidence_axes_11b2ku = (
        "player11b2ku",
        "seed1595",
        "inputuk2b11",
        "frame11b2ku1595",
        "state159511b2ku",
        "playtestuk2b111595",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_11b2ku)) == 6
    if vertices < 5 or min_radius <= 0.0 or max_radius < min_radius:
        return False, vertices, "polygon-domain"
    if not seeded_equal:
        return False, vertices, "rng-drift"
    if self_intersections > 0:
        return False, self_intersections, "invalid-polygon"
    if spawn_budget < 1:
        return False, spawn_budget, "spawn-budget"
    assert max_radius >= min_radius
    return True, spawn_budget, "seeded-asteroids"
